post.summary: Upload model files and create a new model
post.description: Upload model weight files, config, and tokenizer files. The model is automatically created from the uploaded files.

400.description: Invalid request or file validation failed

post.summary: Initiate model download from a repository
post.description: Start a background download task for a model from a Git repository (e.g., Hugging Face). Returns immediately with a download instance ID. The actual download happens in the background.

CreateLlmModelRequest.description: Request to create a new LLM model

DeviceType.description: Device types for ML model inference

DownloadProgressData.description: Progress data for download tracking (stored as JSON in database)

DownloadRequestData.description: Request data for initiating a download (stored as JSON in database)

FileFormat.description: File format types for local models

ListModelsQuery.description: Query parameters for listing models with optional provider filtering

providerId.description: Optional provider ID to filter models by

LlmModelListResponse.description: Response for listing LLM models with pagination

LlmProvider.description: Database entity representing an LLM provider configuration

LlmRepository.description:
LLM Repository database entity
 Represents a row in the llm_repositories table

provider.description:
Optional provider name for LDAP/OAuth authentication
 If not specified, defaults to local password authentication

permissions.description: Effective permissions (union of user's direct permissions + all active group permissions)

MistralRsCommand.description: MistralRS command types for different model formats and use cases

oneOf.description: Vision-enabled plain models for multimodal capabilities

MistralRsSettings.description: MistralRs-specific settings for individual model performance and batching configuration

chat.description: Chat capability - can engage in conversational text generation

image_generator.description: Image generation capability - can generate images from text descriptions

text_embedding.description: Text embedding capability - can generate text embeddings for semantic search

tools.description: Tools capability - can use function calling/tools

repeat_last_n.description: Number of last tokens to consider for repetition penalty

RepositoryAuthConfig.description:
Authentication configuration for LLM repositories
 This is part of the database entity and stored as JSONB in PostgreSQL

id.description: Model ID from hub (for hub downloads) or null for manual downloads

UpdateLlmModelRequest.description: Request to update an existing LLM model
